name: io.github.bolivian-peru/baozi-mcp
description: 76 tools for AI agents to interact with Solana prediction markets on Baozi.bet. Safe-by-default (set BAOZI_LIVE=1 to enable writes).

environmentVariables.description: Solana RPC endpoint URL (defaults to public mainnet)
environmentVariables.name: SOLANA_RPC_URL

environmentVariables.description: Helius RPC URL for enhanced performance (priority over SOLANA_RPC_URL)
environmentVariables.name: HELIUS_RPC_URL

environmentVariables.description: Set to '1' to enable write tools (transaction builders). Safe mode by default.
environmentVariables.name: BAOZI_LIVE

environmentVariables.description: Max single bet in SOL (can only lower, never above 100)
environmentVariables.name: BAOZI_MAX_BET_SOL

environmentVariables.description: Total SOL/day across all bets (unlimited if not set)
environmentVariables.name: BAOZI_DAILY_LIMIT_SOL
